_comment: Optional per-project config. Goes to data/webapp/config.json at runtime. Equivalent fields can be set on the ProjectDeclaration in deepsec.config.ts (priorityPaths, promptAppend); if both are present, this file wins.
promptAppend: Cross-tenant access via missing companyId scoping is the highest-impact bug shape in this codebase. Always check that DB queries filter by req.session.user.companyId.
